Shipment Logistic Dashboard App | Supply Chain B2B SaaS

Mohiuddin Parekh for Decojent UI/UX Design Agency
Follow Following
decojent.com
    • Get in touch
    • #DFE3EA
    • #45506F
    • #B9BCC3
    • #0B0D13
    • #487A94
    • #9E676D
    • #473836
    Download color palette

    Product:

    We designed a B2B Supply Chain SaaS used by shippers and exporters to manage their end-to-end logistics operations. From RFQs and bidding to contract signing, shipment tracking, documentation, invoicing, and analytics — all under one robust platform.

    Work Scope:

    We were brought in to redesign the user dashboard experience — transforming it from a scroll-heavy, information-dense layout into a streamlined, actionable interface that empowers logistics professionals to make faster, smarter decisions.

    Pain Points:

    • - The old dashboard required excessive scrolling to access key insights like Spend, Bids, or Shipment Status.

    • - Users felt overwhelmed by disconnected visuals and cluttered information architecture.

    • - Clients needed better data prioritization, glanceable KPIs, and a modular layout that could scale with future features.

    Our Solution:

    1. Condensed Financial & Bid Data

    All financial metrics—Total Spend, Outstanding Amounts, Expected vs Actual—are now visually represented in digestible blocks and graphs.

    2. Reimagined Data Layout

    • - Side-by-side cards for Incoming Bids, Shipment Statuses, and Supplier Spend

    • - Visual hierarchy allows users to absorb more without scrolling

    • - Charts and lists are both readable and interactive

    3. Polished UI for Daily Use

    • - Fresh visual language using calm neutrals and strategic highlight colors

    • - Seamless experience whether it’s one shipment or 1,000

    • - Modular components ready to support additional data in the future

    What are your thoughts? Drop a comment — We would love to hear from you!

    hit (L), and don’t forget to follow for more! 🚀

    Mobile App UI/UX Design

    Dipa Product PRO
    About this Service

    People use finance apps every day. It better feel good to use.

    We design mobile apps for fintech, banking, crypto, and investment products. The kind of apps where users check their balance, send money, or track their portfolio — and everything just works the way they expect.

    Clean interfaces. Clear numbers. Smooth flows. No confusing screens or dead ends.

    What you get:

    • Custom mobile app UI/UX design

    • 1 design concept, 3 revisions

    • Transaction flows, dashboards, and key screens

    • Clean data presentation that's easy to read

    • Works across iOS and Android

    • Done in 1 week

    We've designed apps for digital wallets, crypto exchanges, banking platforms, and investment tools — products where clarity and trust matter more than anywhere else.

    Building a finance app? Send us your project details and let's make it something users actually enjoy opening.
